title: RUN instruction in Containerfile triggers SIGSEGV when `podman build .` on FreeBSD
body:
### Issue Description

I was experimenting with podman on FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE, trying to see if it was already possible to perform the usual tasks I need with containers and container images.

I have written a simple Containerfile with several RUN instructions in it.

Suddenly, I've stumbled upon a SIGSEGV when tried to build a container image using `podman build .`

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Write a simple Containerfile with a RUN instruction in it:
```
FROM ghcr.io/dfr/freebsd14.1-small:latest
RUN freebsd-version -u > /freebsd-version.txt
CMD ["cat", "/freebsd-version.txt"]
```

2. do `podman build .`


### Describe the results you received

```
root@ebisu:~/probe # podman build . -f Containerfile -t test:latest
STEP 1/3: FROM ghcr.io/dfr/freebsd14.1-small:latest
STEP 2/3: RUN freebsd-version -u > /freebsd-version.txt
error running container: did not get container start message from parent: EOF
panic: runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference
[signal SIGSEGV: segmentation violation code=0x1 addr=0x50 pc=0x221f085]

goroutine 21 [running]:
github.com/containers/buildah.(*Builder).runUsingRuntimeSubproc(_, _, {0x8700fdc80, {0x0, 0x0}, 0x0, {0x870590780, 0x7}, {0x2914180, 0x0, ...}, ...}, ...)
        /wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/podman/work/podman-5.1.1/vendor/github.com/containers/buildah/run_common.go:1256 +0x12e5
github.com/containers/buildah.(*Builder).Run(_, {_, _, _}, {0x8700fdc80, {0x0, 0x0}, 0x0, {0x870590780, 0x7}, ...})
        /wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/podman/work/podman-5.1.1/vendor/github.com/containers/buildah/run_freebsd.go:325 +0x20b1
github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah.(*StageExecutor).Run(_, {0x1, {0x8706033e0, 0x1, 0x1}, {0x0, 0x0, 0x0}, {0x0, 0x0}, ...}, ...)
        /wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/podman/work/podman-5.1.1/vendor/github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah/stage_executor.go:815 +0x1050
github.com/openshift/imagebuilder.(*Builder).Run(0x87036e900, 0x87033f900, {0x90cd98, 0x8704801e0}, 0x1)
        /wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/podman/work/podman-5.1.1/vendor/github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/builder.go:481 +0x527
github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah.(*StageExecutor).Execute(0x8704801e0, {0x907758, 0x87021f650}, {0x8700c44e0, 0x24})
        /wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/podman/work/podman-5.1.1/vendor/github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah/stage_executor.go:1495 +0x33d5
github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah.(*Executor).buildStage(0x870190680, {0x907758, 0x87021f650}, 0x1?, {0x87054d7d0, 0x1, 0x1}, 0x0)
        /wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/podman/work/podman-5.1.1/vendor/github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah/executor.go:570 +0x5c5
github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah.(*Executor).Build.func3.1()
        /wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/podman/work/podman-5.1.1/vendor/github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah/executor.go:934 +0x2b1
created by github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah.(*Executor).Build.func3 in goroutine 53
        /wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/podman/work/podman-5.1.1/vendor/github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah/executor.go:905 +0x305
root@ebisu:~/probe #
```

### Describe the results you expected

The expected result is not having a SIGSEGV in this situation.

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Privileged

### Upstream Latest Release

No

### Additional environment details

I'm running podman 5.1.1 on FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE on a baremetal x86_64 host
```
# uname -a
FreeBSD ebisu.vill.int.nyansq.ru 14.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE releng/14.1-n267679-10e31f0946d8 GENERIC amd64

# podman --version
podman version 5.1.1
```

### Additional information

Also tried to build an image from the same Containerfile using buildah command
```
root@ebisu:~/probe # buildah build --format=docker -f Containerfile -t test:latest .
STEP 1/3: FROM ghcr.io/dfr/freebsd14.1-small:latest
STEP 2/3: RUN freebsd-version -u > /freebsd-version.txt
STEP 3/3: CMD ["cat", "/freebsd-version.txt"]
COMMIT test:latest
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 86da702b809a skipped: already exists
Copying blob 26a88751a2f5 skipped: already exists
Copying blob 801a8c54f568 skipped: already exists
Copying blob 807e35a5450f skipped: already exists
Copying blob 71a00b45753f skipped: already exists
Copying blob 298e881e67ac done   |
Copying config 0def77e88d done   |
Writing manifest to image destination
--> 0def77e88dde
Successfully tagged localhost/test:latest
0def77e88dde02b402dceb5f1554ce082b48076a90f1e010e77aa927dadf2cc3
root@ebisu:~/probe # podman run --rm test:latest
14.1-RELEASE-p5
```

works as expected
